mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_transaction_info ( account_id, user_id, transaction_type, change_amount, balance_after_change, transaction_remark, source_biz_type, source_biz_id, transaction_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{userId}, #{transactionType}, #{changeAmount}, #{balanceAfterChange}, #{transactionRemark}, #{sourceBizType}, #{sourceBizId}, #{transactionTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
